Atle Selberg

Institute for Advanced Study (US) · 1917-2007

A foundational figure in additive number theory whose career predates the arXiv and OpenAlex digital record this directory is built from. Listed here so the lineage behind the modern field stays visible.

StatusFoundational figure (1917-2007)
InstitutionNot available
CountryNot available
Active yearsNot available
h-indexNot available
Source ranksNot ranked (pre-digital era)
zbMATHNot found
OpenAlexNot found
Google ScholarNot found
Mathematics GenealogyNot found
arXivAuthor search
Born1917
Also ranked inNot in current rankings

Fields Medalist; the Selberg class and Selberg trace formula are cornerstones of analytic number theory and the spectral approach to RH

Spotted an error or an omission? Email admin@wwirh.org.

Maintained by Steve Hubbard (admin@wwirh.org). Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open, Mathematics Genealogy Project.
